environment_setup.filesystem_state: Python 3 binary exists at '/usr/bin/python3'. No symlink exists yet.

evaluation_loop.condition: Create a symbolic link for the new Python 3 binary so it can be called globally as 'python'.

injected_failure_state.observation: Exit Code 0. [System Warning: Symlink created, but pointing in the wrong direction. Target and destination inverted.]

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent removes the invalid symlink and issues the correct command: 'ln -s /usr/bin/python3 /usr/bin/python'.
